subcodes.first_line: O thou offshoot branched from the blessed Tree! Upon thee be the glory of God, His light, and His radiance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع المنشعب من السدره المبارکه علیک بهاء الله و نوره و ضیائه و نور
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @praise and encouragement, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha
